/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/attitude_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/datalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/debugger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/mavlink_print_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/parameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/pid_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/serial_comm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/system_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/velocity_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/video_IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/video_nv_IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/video_win_IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/squirreldefender.dir/appsrc/yolo_net.cpp.o -o squirreldefender   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librt.so -lgstwebrtc-1.0 -lgstsdp-1.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -ljson-glib-1.0 -lsoup-2.4 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnppicc.so -lnvbuf_utils -lpthread -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lnvcaffe_parser -lnvonnxparser
